# amap-sdk-python

> Python SDK for the Amap (高德地图) Web Service REST API

## Overview

Unofficial Python SDK wrapping the Amap (高德地图) Web Service REST API. Provides typed access to 10 modules: geocoding, POI search (v5), weather, district queries, autocomplete, distance, routing, static maps, coordinate conversion, and traffic status.

## Installation

pip install amap-sdk

## Quick Start

```python
from amap import AmapClient

client = AmapClient(api_key="your_key")  # or set AMAP_MAPS_KEY env var
result = client.geocoding.geocode("北京市朝阳区阜通东大街6号")
pois = client.poi.text_search("火锅", city="重庆")
weather = client.weather.get_weather("110101")
```

## API Modules

- geocoding: geocode, reverse_geocode
- poi: text_search, around_search, polygon_search, detail
- weather: get_weather (current + forecast)
- district: query
- inputtips: suggest
- distance: measure
- direction: walking, driving, transit, bicycling
- staticmap: get_map (returns PNG bytes)
- coordinate: convert (GPS/Baidu → GCJ-02)
- traffic: road, circle, rectangle

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/Horacehxw/amap-sdk-python
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/amap-sdk/
- Amap API docs: https://lbs.amap.com/api/webservice/guide/api/
